phrases.text_local: Bariyer iplerinin arkasında durmak zorunda mıyım?
phrases.cultural_note: The venue context explicitly states the rule to stay behind barrier ropes at the facade.

likely_response.local: Evet, cephede bariyer iplerinin arkasında durun.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, stay behind the barrier ropes at the facade.

responses.english: Yes, stay behind the barrier ropes at the facade.
responses.french: Evet, cephede bariyer iplerinin arkasında durun.

phrases.cultural_note: The exact location of the crypt within the ruins is not specified in the venue context, so a referral to staff is the safest answer.

likely_response.translation_en: Behind the facade, behind the barrier.

responses.english: Behind the facade, behind the barrier.

phrases.intent_en: Does this ticket cover museum too?
phrases.text_local: Bu bilet müzeyi de kapsıyor mu?
phrases.cultural_note: The venue context confirms the museum is a separate entry, so a direct 'no' is appropriate.

likely_response.local: Hayır, Selçuk Efes Müzesi ayrı giriş.
likely_response.translation_en: No, Selçuk Efes Müzesi is a separate entry.

responses.english: No, Selçuk Efes Müzesi is a separate entry.
responses.french: Hayır, Selçuk Efes Müzesi ayrı giriş.

phrases.intent_en: Can I book a guided tour here?
phrases.text_local: Burada rehberli tur rezervasyonu yapabilir miyim?
phrases.cultural_note: The context confirms guided tour booking is available at the gate.

likely_response.local: Evet, kapıda rehberli tur rezervasyonu yapabilirsiniz.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, you can book a guided tour at the gate.

responses.english: Yes, you can book a guided tour at the gate.
responses.french: Evet, kapıda rehberli tur rezervasyonu yapabilirsiniz.
